commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh But I will punish you according to the fruit of your doings, says the LORD: and I will kindle a fire in its forest, and it shall devour all things round about it. Hebrew, "studies. "So "Your studious pursuits "occurs, ver. 12, in many Hebrew manuscripts, though the printed copy have, "their "and "spoiled "for apprised. (Kennicott) Forest, the temple, which is called Libanus, (Zacharias xi. ) and the houses built of cedar-wood, (4 Kings xxv. ; Calmet) particularly the royal palace of the forest, 3 Kings vii.
